title: Archangel spear
description: Makes minecraft netherite spear to archangel spear 3d model
body:
Animated Archangel spear Texture Pack
Archangel Spear is an ancient spear of heavenly origin, created in the radiance of the primordial light and tempered in a flame that knows no darkness. Its narrow silver-white blade seems to be carved from a pure ray, and golden runes slowly glide across the surface, flashing when evil approaches. The shaft is light and durable, as if alive, responds to the touch of the owner and directs his movements. The spear easily pierces armor and magical barriers, purifies filth and dispels curses, leaving a flash of light and the smell of ozone after impact. For the unworthy, it becomes heavy and scalding, but in the hands of the chosen one it becomes weightless and fast as lightning, turning into an instrument of heavenly judgment and a symbol of hope in the darkest hours.
